   "reasoning": "We can't just inject cash without a plan, but we need to hold onto our teachers. I want to throw everything at teacher incentives, since we risk losing more if we don't. Student scholarships can help, but let's focus on the people on the front lines first. We need to see some real resource mobilization and let's start with the basics – attendance tracking is a must.",
